---
title: "Vsevolod Iakovlev"
image: pfrofpic_sq.jpg
resources: cv_vsevolod_iakovlev.pdf
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 13em
  id: summary
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:v.iakovlev@hw.ac.uk
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/vsevolodiakovlev
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons:google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PhEW2foAAAAJ&hl=en)
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons:orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0009-0003-8054-8382
    - icon: twitter-x
      href: https://x.com/seva_iakovlev
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsevolod-iakovlev/
    - text: CV
      href: cv_vsevolod_iakovlev.pdf
listing: 
  - id: research
    contents: "research/*.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, subtitle, description, author]
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    max-description-length: 120
    date-format: iso
    table-striped: False
    table-hover: True
    image-align: right
    field-links: [date, title, subtitle, description, author]
  - id: code
    contents: "code/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, author, description, date, image]
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    max-description-length: 120
    image-height: 7.7em
    date-format: iso
    grid-item-border: True
    field-links: [title, subtitle, author, description, date, image]
---

:::{#summary}
I'm a Research Associate in Economics at Heriot-Watt University, 
specializing in applied economics. 

My current projects explore:

* transport economics
* labour market mismatch 
* gender wage gap 
* two-sided matching
* applications of machine learning in economics
:::

### Research

:::{#research}
:::

### Code
